user.title: Connect to Evchargo
user.description: Enter your Evchargo app credentials, charger ID, and polling interval.

error.invalid_base_url: The base URL must start with https://

init.title: Evchargo options
init.description: Set how often the integration refreshes charger status (30-240 seconds).

data_description.expose_sensitive_attributes: When enabled, RFID card IDs, authorized-user records and payment config are published as raw entity attributes (readable by all Home Assistant users and stored in backups). Leave off to publish only counts.
